rawText:
```json
{
  "freshness_score": 4,
  "trust_score": 6,
  "conversion_score": 5,
  "design_age_estimate": "slightly_outdated",
  "summary": "The website presents a functional but visually dated design that could benefit from modernization to improve trust and conversion rates for local search customers.",
  "issues": [
    {
      "id": "hero_image_quality",
      "severity": "major",
      "title": "Low-Resolution Hero Image",
      "what_observed": "The hero image featuring the couple appears pixelated and low-resolution, especially noticeable on desktop.",
      "why_problem": "A blurry image immediately signals a lack of professionalism and attention to detail. A local customer searching for a reliable roofing company will likely perceive this as a sign of a poorly run business and quickly leave.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "High-resolution, professionally shot image of a finished attic renovation or happy customers. Image should be optimized for web and appear sharp on all devices.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Replace the current hero image with a high-resolution, professionally photographed image. Ensure the image is optimized for web to reduce file size and improve loading speed."
    },
    {
      "id": "overused_stock_photo",
      "severity": "major",
      "title": "Generic Stock Photo",
      "what_observed": "The couple in the hero image appears to be a generic stock photo, lacking authenticity.",
      "why_problem": "Customers are increasingly wary of stock photos, as they suggest a lack of genuine work or local presence. A local customer wants to see *real* results from a company that understands their area.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "Real photos of completed attic renovations in the Brisbane area, showcasing the company's work and local expertise.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Replace the stock photo with authentic photos of completed projects in the Brisbane area. Consider a gallery of before-and-after photos."
    },
    {
      "id": "busy_hero_design",
      "severity": "major",
      "title": "Cluttered Hero Section",
      "what_observed": "The hero section is visually busy with overlapping elements (text, images, shapes) and a bright color scheme.",
      "why_problem": "A cluttered design overwhelms visitors and makes it difficult to focus on the key message. A local customer arriving from a search result needs to quickly understand what the company offers.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "Clean, minimalist hero section with a clear headline, concise value proposition, and a prominent call to action. Use whitespace effectively to create visual breathing room.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Simplify the hero section by removing unnecessary elements and using a more restrained color palette. Focus on a clear headline and a strong call to action."
    },
    {
      "id": "illegible_text_color",
      "severity": "critical",
      "title": "Low Contrast Text",
      "what_observed": "The white text on the light blue background in the hero section has low contrast, making it difficult to read.",
      "why_problem": "Poor contrast makes the text illegible, especially for users with visual impairments or on smaller screens. A local customer won't bother trying to read if it's straining their eyes.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "Dark text on a light background or vice versa, with sufficient contrast to ensure readability. Use a color contrast checker to verify accessibility.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Increase the contrast between the text and background in the hero section. Use a dark color for the text and a lighter color for the background, or vice versa."
    },
    {
      "id": "hidden_contact_mobile",
      "severity": "critical",
      "title": "Hidden Phone Number on Mobile",
      "what_observed": "The phone number is small and difficult to find on mobile, requiring scrolling to see.",
      "why_problem": "Local search customers are primarily looking for a phone number to call immediately. Hiding this information creates a significant conversion barrier and sends them to a competitor.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "Prominent, clickable phone number in the header of the mobile site, visible without scrolling.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Make the phone number a prominent, clickable element in the mobile header. Ensure it's easily visible and accessible on all screen sizes."
    },
    {
      "id": "dated_visual_style",
      "severity": "minor",
      "title": "Outdated Visual Style",
      "what_observed": "The use of gradients, bevels, and overly bright colors feels dated and unprofessional.",
      "why_problem": "An outdated visual style can erode trust and make the business appear less credible. A local customer may assume the company is not up-to-date with current trends or technology.",
      "what_correct_looks_like": "Modern, flat design with a clean color palette and minimalist aesthetic.",
      "how_to_fix_in_redesign": "Adopt a modern, flat design style with a clean color palette and minimalist aesthetic. Remove gradients, bevels, and other outdated visual effects."
    }
  ],
  "positive_observations": [
    "Clear navigation menu.",
    "Service area listed prominently.",
    "Use of relevant keywords in headings."
  ],
  "redesign_priorities": ["1. Make phone number immediately visible on mobile", "2. Replace low-resolution/stock photos with authentic local images", "3. Simplify hero section and improve text contrast"],
  "confidence": 0.85
}
```

parsedJson.summary: The website presents a functional but visually dated design that could benefit from modernization to improve trust and conversion rates for local search customers.

issues.title: Low-Resolution Hero Image
issues.what_observed: The hero image featuring the couple appears pixelated and low-resolution, especially noticeable on desktop.
issues.why_problem: A blurry image immediately signals a lack of professionalism and attention to detail. A local customer searching for a reliable roofing company will likely perceive this as a sign of a poorly run business and quickly leave.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: High-resolution, professionally shot image of a finished attic renovation or happy customers. Image should be optimized for web and appear sharp on all devices.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the current hero image with a high-resolution, professionally photographed image. Ensure the image is optimized for web to reduce file size and improve loading speed.

issues.title: Generic Stock Photo
issues.what_observed: The couple in the hero image appears to be a generic stock photo, lacking authenticity.
issues.why_problem: Customers are increasingly wary of stock photos, as they suggest a lack of genuine work or local presence. A local customer wants to see *real* results from a company that understands their area.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Real photos of completed attic renovations in the Brisbane area, showcasing the company's work and local expertise.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the stock photo with authentic photos of completed projects in the Brisbane area. Consider a gallery of before-and-after photos.

issues.title: Cluttered Hero Section
issues.what_observed: The hero section is visually busy with overlapping elements (text, images, shapes) and a bright color scheme.
issues.why_problem: A cluttered design overwhelms visitors and makes it difficult to focus on the key message. A local customer arriving from a search result needs to quickly understand what the company offers.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Clean, minimalist hero section with a clear headline, concise value proposition, and a prominent call to action. Use whitespace effectively to create visual breathing room.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Simplify the hero section by removing unnecessary elements and using a more restrained color palette. Focus on a clear headline and a strong call to action.

issues.title: Low Contrast Text
issues.what_observed: The white text on the light blue background in the hero section has low contrast, making it difficult to read.
issues.why_problem: Poor contrast makes the text illegible, especially for users with visual impairments or on smaller screens. A local customer won't bother trying to read if it's straining their eyes.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Dark text on a light background or vice versa, with sufficient contrast to ensure readability. Use a color contrast checker to verify accessibility.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Increase the contrast between the text and background in the hero section. Use a dark color for the text and a lighter color for the background, or vice versa.

issues.title: Hidden Phone Number on Mobile
issues.what_observed: The phone number is small and difficult to find on mobile, requiring scrolling to see.
issues.why_problem: Local search customers are primarily looking for a phone number to call immediately. Hiding this information creates a significant conversion barrier and sends them to a competitor.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Prominent, clickable phone number in the header of the mobile site, visible without scrolling.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Make the phone number a prominent, clickable element in the mobile header. Ensure it's easily visible and accessible on all screen sizes.

issues.title: Outdated Visual Style
issues.what_observed: The use of gradients, bevels, and overly bright colors feels dated and unprofessional.
issues.why_problem: An outdated visual style can erode trust and make the business appear less credible. A local customer may assume the company is not up-to-date with current trends or technology.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Modern, flat design with a clean color palette and minimalist aesthetic.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Adopt a modern, flat design style with a clean color palette and minimalist aesthetic. Remove gradients, bevels, and other outdated visual effects.

positive_observations: Use of relevant keywords in headings.
redesign_priorities: 1. Make phone number immediately visible on mobile
2. Replace low-resolution/stock photos with authentic local images
3. Simplify hero section and improve text contrast
